title: Energy & Natural Resources | Law Firm | Capabilities | Greenberg Traurig LLP
content:
- Carbon Capture & Sequestration
- Electric Power & Utility Regulation
- Energy Project Finance & Development
- Liquefied Natural Gas
- Oil & Gas Pipeline Regulation
Greenberg Traurig’s Energy & Natural Resources Practice brings together attorneys from across the firm and around the globe who provide advice to energy clients on important aspects of their business. Our attorneys have broad transactional, regulatory, and litigation experience across many sectors of the energy industry, including oil and gas, LNG, electricity, coal, wind, solar and other renewable energy sources. The firm’s exceptional multi-office platform, including key offices in major energy centers, enables us to serve and implement legal strategies for energy clients throughout the U.S., and in international markets.
Several of our energy attorneys are former general counsel and in-house counsel at energy industry companies while many have governmental experience—these additional insights provide a valuable perspective for our energy clients. Our Energy & Natural Resources Practice is recognized as a Tier 1 Energy Practice by Best Lawyers ® (2019-2023) and our attorneys have been recognized by major legal publications such as Chambers and Partners , Legal 500 , and Best Lawyers.
The E2 Environmental and Energy Law blog offers insights and analysis of new environmental and energy legislation, regulations, cases, policies and trends, with a focus on relevant business opportunities and risks.

### View GT Energy & Natural Resources Webinars
To learn more about our Energy & Natural Resources capabilities, please feel free to reach out to our Energy & Natural Resources Practice contacts .
